products.name: TMRV 1626
products.full_description:
Medium maturing (Kharif:125-130 days) improved rice variety with high yield potential
Semi-erect plant habit
Number of productive tillers: 10-15
Semi-dwarf plant type having 95 -105 cm plant height
More number of grains/panicles
Medium slender fine grains with good milling percent with good head rice recovery
Field tolerance to BLB, blast, and other major diseases
Tolerant to lodging
Ideal for cultivation during the Kharif season in Nepal
Released and notified by Govt. Of Nepal for cultivation

Semi-erect plant habit

Good milling percent with high head rice recovery
Suitable for less water or water scarce conditions
Tolerant to lodging and field tolerant to major pests and diseases
Suitable for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, TG, UK, UP & WB

products.name: TMRH 5786
products.full_description:
Salient Features of TMRH 5786

Maturity: Mid-early maturity (Kharif: 120-125 days & Rabi; 125-130 days)
Plant Type & Morphology: Medium-tall plants (100–110 cm) with semi-erect growth

habit, strong culm and compact with good lodging tolerance.
Tillering Potential: 14-18 productive tillers per plant under normal crop growing condition.
Panicle & Grain Characteristics: Well-exerted long panicles. Long bold grains with uniform

size and shape.
Good milling percentage with satisfactory head rice recovery and acceptable cooking quality

preferred by consumers.
Biotic Stress Reaction: Moderately tolerant to major pests and diseases under recommend

crop management practices.
Adaptation & Ecology: widely adopted & suitable for irrigated transplanted conditions during

Kharif and Rabi seasons across major rice-growing regions.

products.name: RAJNATH (TMMH 8863)
products.full_description:
Premium Maize hybrid with very high yield potential
Highly suitable for Spring season cultivation being highly heat tolerant (Excellent seed setting in high temperature)
Maturity duration: Spring 90-95 days
Erect plant type and suitable for high density planting
Long, robust and uniform cobs with 16-20 rows & 40-45 seeds/row
Shelling per cent: > 82%
Very attractive Orange Yellow semi-flint grains with good storability
Good standability and highly responsive to high management growing conditions
Suitable for high management growing conditions during Spring seasons in AP, BR, CG, GJ, HR, PB, TG, UK, UP, & WB

products.name: Fodder (TMMH2838)
products.full_description:
Maize hybrid with high yield potential
Medium maturity; around 90–100 days for Kharif and 115–120 days for Rabi
Erect plant structure suitable for dense planting
Cob positioned at the 5th–6th node
Long cobs with 16–18 rows and 40–45 seeds per row
High shelling percentage (over 80%)
Orange flint grain appearance with good storability
Tolerant to major field pests and diseases
Suitable for rain-fed and high-input (management) growing conditions
Recommended for Kharif in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, HP, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, RJ, TG, TN, UK, UP & WB; Rabi/Spring in AP, BR, CG, MH, MP

• Mid-early maturing (Kharif: 115-120 days) Rice variety with high

yield potential

• Semi-erect plant habit

• Number of productive tillers: 12-14

• Semi-dwarf plant type having 95-100 cm plant height

• Medium slender fine grains with good milling percent with high head rice

• Field tolerant to major pests and diseases

• Tolerant to lodging

• Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, HR, JH, MH, MP, PB, OD,TN,TS, UK, UP & WB

products.name: Charu (TMSH 1201)
products.full_description:
CHARU (TMSH 1201)

• Multi-cut SSG hybrid with high yield potential

• Good quality fodder with higher digestibility

• Thin stem and more number of tillers / plant

• Soft plant stem and internode having high digestibility and palatability

• Long dark green leaves

• Harvesting starts after 42 days as very low HCN content recorded after 40 days

• Next subsequent cut starts after 3-4 week of previous cuttings

• Tolerant to leaf diseases

• Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, PB, RJ, TS, TN, UK, UP & WB

products.name: Charu Gold (TMFH 1208)
products.full_description:
CHARU GOLD (TMFH 1208)

• Sudan grass fodder hybrid with very high yielding potential

• Growing up to 10-12 feet tall with long slender highly branched

leaves and abundant tillers

• Excellent leaf to stem ratio

• Excellent root system to ensure high yield

• Harvesting starts from 45 days as very low HCN content observed in

fodder after 40 days

• Soft stems and good quality fodder with higher digestibility for livestock

• Tolerant to heat and even grown during high temperatures

• Suitable for next cutting every 3-4 weeks after first cutting

• Tolerant to leaf diseases and major pests

• Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, PB, RJ, TS, TN, UK, UP & WB

products.name: Samata Speed (TMFH 3206)
products.full_description:
SAMATA SPEED (TMFH 1206)

• Good quality fodder with higher digestibility for livestock

• Multi-cut SSG hybrid with very high yield potential

• Thin stem, broad and higher number of leaves / plant

• Soft plant stem and internode having high digestibility and palal

• Very low HCN content recorded after 40 days

• Harvesting starts after 45 days from sowing

• Next subsequent cut starts after 3-4 week of previous cuttings

• Tolerant to leaf diseases and major pests

• Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, MP, OD, PB, RJ, TS, TN, UK, UP & WB

products.name: Sweet Fora (TMFH 1276)
products.full_description:
SWEET FORA (TMFH 1276)

• Single cut Sweet Sorghum fodder but can be taken another cut

• Juicy stems with sweetness and preferred by cattle

• Plant height: 280 – 320 cm

• Good for silage making

• Higher Brix and higher in protein

• Higher digestibility and platability

• Tolerant to drought situation and leaf diseases

• Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, PB, RJ, TS, TN, UK, UP & WB

products.name: TMFH 1255
products.full_description:
Multi-cut forage bajra hybrid with high yield potential
Harvesting starts very early as there is no HCN content in this fodder
Good quality fodder with better nutritive value and higher protein content
Plant height during 1st cutting (35-40 days): 150-170 cm
More number of thin stem tillers/plant
Plant stem and internode is very soft and internode
After 1st cutting next subsequent cutting starts after 3 weeks of previous cuttings
Tolerant to drought situation and highly tolerant to leafy diseases
Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA, MH, MP, OD, PB, RJ, TS, TN, UK, UP & WB

products.name: TOP DAIRY (TMFH 1275)
products.full_description:
Single cut forage Sorghum hybrid for direct feeding and Silage
Very tall height with Late flowering (>85 days)
Thick, juicy sweet stem with soft internodes
Higher green fodder yield with good nutritional quality parameters
Higher digestibility and palatability
Higher in Brix & protein
Stay green & clean foliage
Tolerant to lodging and major leaf diseases
Widely adapted for cultivation in AP, AS, BR, CG, GJ, HR, JH, KA,
MH, MP, OD, RJ, TG, TN, UK, UP & WB
